source_text: 4.6 Brake System Encoder - BSE Refer to T.4.3 for specific requirements of the BSE ## EV.4.7 APPS / Brake Pedal Plausibility Check EV.4.7.1 Must monitor for the two conditions: - The mechanical brakes are engaged EV.4.6, T.3.2.4 - The APPS signals more than 25\% Pedal Travel EV.4.5 EV.4.7.2 If the two conditions in EV.4.7.1 occur at the same time: a. Power to the Motor(s) must be immediately and completely shut down b
requirement_text_pred: Power to the Motor(s) must be immediately and completely shut down
